Uses of Interface
org.key_project.logic.op.SortedOperator

Packages that use SortedOperator
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic
provides a representation for the term and sequent structure.
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op
contains the operators of Terms.
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.metaconstruct
contains classes representing the meta constructs of Taclets.
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.metaconstruct.arith
contains classes representing the special meta constructs of Taclets performing arithmetic operations.
de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.newsmt2
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.quantifierHeuristics
 
org.key_project.logic.op
 

  • Uses of SortedOperator in de.uka.ilkd.key.logic

    Subinterfaces of SortedOperator in de.uka.ilkd.key.logic
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    ProgramConstruct
    A type that implement this interface can be used in all java programs instead of an expression or statement.

  • Uses of SortedOperator in de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op

    Subinterfaces of SortedOperator in de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    IObserverFunction
     
    interface 
    IProgramMethod
     
    interface 
    IProgramVariable
     
    interface 
    QuantifiableVariable
    This interface represents the variables that can be bound (by quantifiers or other binding operators).
    interface 
    TermTransformer
    TermTransformer perform complex term transformation which cannot be (efficiently or at all) described by taclets.
    interface 
    UpdateableOperator
    Operators implementing this interface may stand for locations as well.
    Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op that implement SortedOperator
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractSortedOperator
    Abstract sorted operator class offering some common functionality.
    class 
    AbstractTermTransformer
    Abstract class factoring out commonalities of typical term transformer implementations.
    final class 
    ElementaryUpdate
    Class of operators for elementary updates, i.e., updates of the form "x := t".
    final class 
    Equality
    This class defines the logic equality operator =.
    final class 
    FormulaSV
    A schema variable that is used as placeholder for formulas.
    class 
    JFunction
    Objects of this class represent function and predicate symbols in JavaDL.
    final class 
    Junctor
    Class of junctor operators, i.e., operators connecting a given number of formula to create another formula.
    final class 
    LocationVariable
    This class represents proper program variables, which are not program constants.
    final class 
    LogicVariable
    The objects of this class represent logical variables, used e.g.
    class 
    Modality
    This class is used to represent a dynamic logic modality like diamond and box (but also extensions of DL like preserves and throughout are possible in the future).
    class 
    ObserverFunction
    Objects of this class represent "observer" function or predicate symbols.
    class 
    OperatorSV
    Abstract base class for schema variables.
    final class 
    ProgramConstant
    This class represents currently only static final fields initialised with a compile time constant.
    final class 
    ProgramMethod
    The program method represents a (pure) method in the logic.
    final class 
    ProgramSV
    Objects of this class are schema variables matching program constructs within modal operators.
    class 
    ProgramVariable
    The objects of this class represent program variables and program constants (resulting from static final declarations in programs; TODO: it is weird that constants are a special case of variables).
    final class 
    Quantifier
    The two objects of this class represent the universal and the existential quantifier, respectively.
    final class 
    SkolemTermSV
    Schema variable that is instantiated with fresh Skolem constants.
    final class 
    SortDependingFunction
    The objects of this class represent families of function symbols, where each family contains an instantiation of a template symbol for a particular sort.
    final class 
    TermLabelSV
    A schema variable which matches term labels
    final class 
    TermSV
    A schema variable that is used as placeholder for terms.
    class 
    Transformer
    Functions with a restricted/special rule set only applicable for the top level of the term transformer and not directly for its arguments, prohibiting any rule applications to sub arguments as well as applications from outside such as update applications.
    final class 
    UpdateJunctor
    Class of update junctor operators, i.e., operators connecting a given number of updates to create another update.
    final class 
    UpdateSV
    A schema variable that is used as placeholder for updates.
    final class 
    VariableSV
    Schema variable that is instantiated with logical variables.

  • Uses of SortedOperator in de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.metaconstruct

    Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.metaconstruct that implement SortedOperator
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    AddCast
     
    final class 
    ArrayBaseInstanceOf
    Creates an Type::instance(..) term for the component type of the array.
    final class 
    ConstantValue
    Replace a program variable that is a compile-time constant with the value of the initializer
    final class 
    CreateBeforeLoopUpdate
    Initializes the "before loop" update needed for the modifiable clause.
    final class 
    CreateFrameCond
    Creates the frame condition (aka "modifiable clause") for the given loop.
    final class 
    CreateHeapAnonUpdate
    Creates the anonymizing update for the heap.
    final class 
    CreateLocalAnonUpdate
    Expects a loop body and creates the anonymizing update out_1:=anon_1||...||out_n:=anon_n, where anon_1, ..., anon_n are the written variables in the loop body visible to the outside.
    final class 
    CreateWellformedCond
    Creates the wellformedness condition for the given anonymizing heap terms if they apply for the current profile and modality type.
    final class 
    EnumConstantValue
    resolve a program variable to an integer literal.
    class 
    ExpandQueriesMetaConstruct
    Uses the class QueryExpand in order to insert query expansions in the term that the meta construct is applied on.
    final class 
    IntroAtPreDefsOp
    Transformer that introduces concrete prestate variables
    final class 
    MemberPVToField
     
    class 
    ObserverEqualityMetaConstruct
    This meta contruct allows one to prove equality (equivalence) of two observer terms if they belong to the same observer function symbol.

    Method
    Description
    static SExpr
    HandlerUtil.funDeclaration(SortedOperator op, String name)
    Generate a smtlib expression for the smtlib declaration that represents the operator op.

    Subinterfaces of SortedOperator in org.key_project.logic.op
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    ParsableVariable
    This interface represents the variables that can be recognized by one of the parsers.
    interface 
    QuantifiableVariable
    This interface represents the variables that can be bound (by quantifiers or other binding operators).
    interface 
    UpdateableOperator
    Operators implementing this interface may stand for locations as well.
